meta.title: Your Song Samples
meta.description: Browse your generated song samples and choose your favorite version.

hero.title: Your samples, ready to choose
hero.description: Every generated song lands here first. Subscribers keep samples permanently; guests and non-subscribers can unlock within <emphasis>72 hours</emphasis>.

empty.title: No samples yet
empty.description: Create a song sample first, then it will appear here for your sample library.
